examples: Gently tap the egg shells with the back of a teaspoon and crack the shells.
To keep store-bought flowers fresh, snip an inch off each stem, add two teaspoons of vodka and one teaspoon sugar.
In reality, that would amount to bailing out the Pacific Ocean with a teaspoon.
The spoon is ancient, although, like the fork, the teaspoon and tablespoon we use today are not.
